plugin.name: MW_Shapes
plugin.author: Proteles
plugin.purpose: Miniwindow spike demo: shapes, gradients, pen styles

muclient.script:
local win = "mw_shapes_" .. GetPluginID() local WIDTH, HEIGHT = 240, 160
local FRAME = 0x808080 local RED = 0x0000FF -- BGR local GREEN = 0x00C000 local BLUE = 0xF0A000 -- (BGR: orange-ish blue) local YELLOW = 0x00E0E0 local WHITE = 0xFFFFFF
function OnPluginInstall() WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, WIDTH, HEIGHT, miniwin.pos_center_all, 0, 0)
-- Vertical gradient background. WindowGradient(win, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0x301810, 0x100806, miniwin.gradient_vertical) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_frame, 0, 0, 0, 0, FRAME)
-- Filled ellipse + outline (pen + brush). WindowCircleOp(win, miniwin.circle_ellipse, 14, 14, 84, 64, WHITE, miniwin.pen_solid, 2, RED, miniwin.brush_solid, 0, 0)
-- Round-rectangle with rounded corners (Extra1/Extra2 = corner ellipse). WindowCircleOp(win, miniwin.circle_round_rectangle, 100, 14, 170, 64, YELLOW, miniwin.pen_solid, 1, GREEN, miniwin.brush_solid, 16, 16)
-- A triangle via WindowPolygon (filled + outlined, closed). WindowPolygon(win, "190,14, 226,64, 190,64", WHITE, miniwin.pen_solid, 1, BLUE, miniwin.brush_solid, true, false)
-- Dashed + dotted lines. WindowLine(win, 14, 86, 226, 86, GREEN, miniwin.pen_dash, 1) WindowLine(win, 14, 96, 226, 96, YELLOW, miniwin.pen_dot, 1)
-- An arc (bounding ellipse outline in the spike). WindowArc(win, 14, 104, 110, 150, 0, 0, 0, 0, RED, miniwin.pen_solid, 2)
WindowFont(win, "f", "Menlo", 11, false, false, false, false) WindowText(win, "f", "shapes / gradient / pens", 120, 132, 0, 0, WHITE) WindowShow(win, true) end
